monitoring.redis.editableOnlyString: Only STRING Redis key-value entries can be edited for now.
monitoring.redis.noticeDesc: The list queries Redis keys with SCAN. Common Redis types can be viewed, while create/edit currently supports STRING entries only.
monitoring.redis.patternPlaceholder: Enter a Redis pattern, e.g. simplepoint:*
monitoring.redis.ttlRule: TTL must be a number of seconds greater than 0
